---
title: "x8_genbank_json_export"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
librarian::shelf(tidyverse, jsonlite, here)

# import json file
json_12s = fromJSON(here("methods_analysis", "output", "12S", "UK0XTPC0016-Alignment.json"))

# strip hit taxa
search_12s = json_12s$BlastOutput2$report$results$search

all_hits = tibble(asv_id = c())

# for each item
for (ii in 1:length(search_12s$hits)) {
  print(ii)
  ii_hits = search_12s$hits[[ii]]$description %>%
    map_dfr(as_tibble, .id = "hit_id") %>%
    mutate(asv_id = search_12s$query_title[ii])
  
  all_hits = bind_rows(all_hits, ii_hits)
}

all_hits = all_hits %>%
  select(asv_id,
         everything())

write_csv(all_hits, here("methods_analysis", "output", "12S", "UK0XTPC0016-Alignment.csv"))

```
